items.title: 3 Top Tech Stocks to Buy Right Now
items.author: Anders Bylund
items.description: The article recommends three tech stocks to consider as investors rebalance their portfolios for 2025: AMD, IBM, and Universal Display. AMD is seen as a solid AI hardware investment, IBM's AI services are expected to see soaring demand, and Universal Display's OLED technology is finding more real-world use cases.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights AMD's strong position in the AI hardware market, with growing demand for its Instinct AI chips and a promising roadmap for future generations. The stock is seen as an affordable alternative to Nvidia in the AI hardware space.

The article notes that IBM's long-term bet on AI is starting to pay off, and the company's enterprise-class AI services are expected to see soaring demand in the coming years. Despite its recent price gains, the stock is still seen as attractively valued compared to peers.

The article highlights the growing adoption of OLED technology in various applications, from foldable phones to high-end TVs and luxury car dashboards. Universal Display, which collects royalties and sells OLED materials, is seen as a compelling growth story with a reasonable valuation.
